title: lindernia micrantha
intro: Lindernia micrantha, also known as small-flowered Lindernia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Linderniaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lindernia micrantha include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive issues, and boost the immune system. Lindernia micrantha can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
